title: The Widening Gap: Understanding Economic Inequality in the Modern World
topic: Economic Inequality in the Modern World

questions.sentence: Economic inequality, the stark disparity in wealth and income distribution, has become a defining challenge of the modern world.
Firstly, globalization has intensified competition, often leading to a 'race to the bottom' where wages are suppressed in an attempt to remain competitive on the international stage.
Secondly, technological advancements, while bringing immense benefits, have also exacerbated inequality.
Furthermore, unequal access to quality education and healthcare plays a crucial role.
It can lead to social unrest and political polarization, as resentment builds among those who feel left behind.
Ultimately, creating a society where everyone has a genuine opportunity to thrive is not merely an ethical imperative but a practical necessity for sustainable progress.
